metadata.name: aws-archie-role
metadata.title: Archie Cross-Account Role
metadata.description: Secure, managed IAM role for connecting your AWS account to Archie. Implements the principle of least privilege using restricted read-only permissions and STS External ID verification. The industry-standard approach for cross-account infrastructure management.
metadata.author: InnovativeApps
features: No long-term credentials or access keys required

role_name.title: Role Name
role_name.description: Custom role name (optional, will be auto-generated if not provided)

archie_account_id.title: Archie Account Id
archie_account_id.description: Archie's AWS account ID that will assume this role

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: External ID for additional security when assuming the role

project_name.title: Project Name
project_name.description: Unique name for this deployment (lowercase, no spaces)

externalId.title: External ID
externalId.description: Unique security identifier generated by Archie

archieAccountId.title: Archie Account ID
archieAccountId.description: The AWS Account ID of the Archie platform

security_banner.title: Secure Cross-Account Trust
security_banner.description: The External ID and Account ID are used to establish a secure trust relationship. This prevents "confused deputy" attacks by ensuring Archie only assumes this role when specifically authorized for your unique integration.

policy_preview.title: ReadOnly Policy (Included)
policy_preview.description: Archie deployments begin with Read-Only permissions. You will need to manually elevate this role's permissions in your AWS Console after the connection is established to enable infrastructure creation.

policy_document.title: Policy Document
policy_document.description: JSON representation of the ReadOnly IAM policy

security.description: Implements security best practices for cloud infrastructure with network isolation, IAM roles, and secure access patterns.

reliability.description: Ensures high availability and fault tolerance with multi-AZ deployment and automated recovery mechanisms.

performance_efficiency.description: Optimizes resource utilization and performance with scalable compute resources and efficient networking.
best_practices: Optimized VPC subnet design for performance

cost_optimization.description: Balances cost efficiency with reliability through appropriate resource sizing and usage-based pricing.

operational_excellence.description: Enables operational best practices with infrastructure as code, monitoring, and automated management.
best_practices: Infrastructure as Code with Pulumi for automated deployments

sustainability.description: Supports sustainable practices through efficient resource utilization and regional service usage.
